title: Consultant Digital Analytics (all genders)
description_snippet:
Wir gehören zu den Top-Adressen in der IT-Welt und fokussieren uns auf die Optimierung der Kerngeschäfts­prozesse unserer Kunden. Durch den smarten Einsatz maßgeschneiderter IT-Lösungen unterstützen wir unsere Kunden dabei, das Beste aus ihrem Business und aktuellen Technologien herauszuholen. Unseren Erfolg aber erreichen wir nur durch eins: die Menschen bei adesso! Sie bringen Ideen, fachliches Know how und Technologien zusammen. Gemeinsam programmieren wir (deine) Zukunft bei adesso.

DEINE ROLLE


Analytics-Konzeption: Entwickle Analytics-Strategien und konzipiere individuelle Lösungen für komplexe Herausforderungen in Web- und App-Projekten.
Implementierung: Implementiere Analytics-Tools und richte Tag-Management-, Tracking- und Consent-Management-Systeme für unsere Kunden ein.
Report
description_full:
Wir gehören zu den Top-Adressen in der IT-Welt und fokussieren uns auf die Optimierung der Kerngeschäfts­prozesse unserer Kunden. Durch den smarten Einsatz maßgeschneiderter IT-Lösungen unterstützen wir unsere Kunden dabei, das Beste aus ihrem Business und aktuellen Technologien herauszuholen. Unseren Erfolg aber erreichen wir nur durch eins: die Menschen bei adesso! Sie bringen Ideen, fachliches Know how und Technologien zusammen. Gemeinsam programmieren wir (deine) Zukunft bei adesso.

DEINE ROLLE


Analytics-Konzeption: Entwickle Analytics-Strategien und konzipiere individuelle Lösungen für komplexe Herausforderungen in Web- und App-Projekten.
Implementierung: Implementiere Analytics-Tools und richte Tag-Management-, Tracking- und Consent-Management-Systeme für unsere Kunden ein.
Reporting & Dashboards: Erstelle Berichte und interaktive Dashboards, visualisiere Ergebnisse und interpretiere diese gemeinsam mit internen Teams im Online Marketing.
Compliance & Prozesse: Optimiere Prozesse und unterstütze unsere Kunden dabei, technische und rechtliche Anforderungen wie die Cookie-Compliance einzuhalten.
Wissensvermittlung: Vermittle Wissen, indem du interne und externe Schulungen zu Analytics-Themen durchführst.
Strategische Beratung: Berate Kunden und begleite sie beim strategischen Ausbau ihres Trackings.


DEIN PROFIL


Analytics- und Tracking-Systeme: Durch deine mehrjährige Berufserfahrung (mind. 3 Jahre) kennst du bereits Tools wie Piwik PRO, Matomo oder Google Analytics und bist mit Tag-Management- und Dashboard-Systemen vertraut. Aber auch Consent Management Plattformen sind dir nicht unbekannt und du verstehst die Funktion von Cookie Bannern auf Webseiten und in Mobile Apps.
Online-Marketing Expertise: Insbesondere datengetriebene Kampagnen gehören zu deinem Fachwissen.
Technisches Verständnis: Du bringst fundiertes Know-how in Webtechnologien und Programmiersprachen wie HTML, CSS und JavaScript mit.
Kenntnisse zur strategischen Analytics-Beratung: Idealerweise bringst du erste Erfahrung mit ganzheitlichen Datenstrategien für Unternehmen mit und bist begeisterungsfähig für technologische Entwicklungen und Trends im Analytics-Bereich.
Kommunikationsstärke: Du bist vertriebsorientiert und begeisterst andere für das Thema Digital Marketing.
KI Kompetenz: Du setzt KI-Tools in deinem Fachgebiet souverän ein, bewertest die Ergebnisse kritisch und unterstützt Kunden und adessi dabei, Potenziale von KI zu nutzen.
Sprachkenntnisse: Deine sehr guten Deutsch- und guten Englischkenntnisse ermöglichen dir eine sichere Kommunikation.


Unser Versprechen: Du wirst dich bei uns wohlfühlen! Kollegial, familiär und auf Augenhöhe – wir leben Austausch, Teamgeist und einen respektvollen Umgang miteinander. Diversität und verschiedene Blickwinkel werden bei uns genauso geschätzt wie du als Mensch. Das und viel mehr steht für unser ganz besonderes Wir-Gefühl. Für das es sogar ein Wort gibt: adessi.

Unsere Kultur und das Zusammenarbeiten sind geprägt von gegenseitiger Wertschätzung, Anerkennung und Unterstützung. Das verbindet uns hierarchieübergreifend – auch im Home-Office. So belegen wir zum wiederholten Mal den 1. Platz beim Wettbewerb „Deutschlands Beste Arbeitgeber in der ITK“!. Unser umfangreiches Trainingsangebot und ein transparentes Laufbahnstufenmodell für alle sorgen dafür, dass deine Entwicklung bei uns nicht stillsteht. Denn gemeinsam zu wachsen und Chancengeber zu sein, das ist programmiert in unserer DNA.

description_full:
Sika is a specialty chemicals company with a globally leading position in the development and production of systems and products for bonding, sealing, damping, reinforcing, and protection in the building sector and industrial manufacturing. Sika has subsidiaries in 103 countries around the world and, in over 400 factories, produces innovative technologies for customers worldwide. In doing so, it plays a crucial role in enabling the transformation of the construction and transportation sector toward greater environmental compatibility. With more than 33,000 employees, the company generated sales of CHF 11.20 billion in 2025.





Job Description



In this role you support the Data Center Vertical Market team across EMEA by providing technical, administrative and project documentation support related to project submittals, calculations and specification preparation. The role works closely with Vertical Market Managers and local organizations to improve efficiency in project preparation, support successful project and product sales conversion, and enable the Data Center team to increase focus on customer engagement and pipeline development.



Support preparation and coordination of technical submittals, calculations and project documentation for Data Center projects across EMEA
Assist Vertical Market Managers and local organizations with project documentation, specification support and customer technical requirements
Support successful conversion of project and product sales through timely and accurate preparation of technical documentation
Contribute to optimization and standardization of submittal preparation processes to improve efficiency and consistency across the region
Coordinate with Corporate Target Markets, technical teams and local organizations to collect required project and product information
Support Commercial Product Rollout activities by assisting local organizations with technical documentation, positioning materials and product-related support
Support the collection and translation of market, customer and technical insights into actionable improvements and alignment with Corporate functions and R&D teams
Ensure transparent tracking and organization of supported projects and documentation activities.
Contribute towards a positive team environment and spirit with colleagues, supervisors and local organizations
Build and maintain strong internal networks across Corporate, Regional and local organizations, supporting collaboration and contributing to the effectiveness of the Data Center Vertical Market team


Qualifications


Technical or Engineering degree within Construction Technology, Civil Engineering, Mechanical/Electrical Engineering, or related field advantageous
2–5 years of experience in technical support, specification management, project coordination or construction-related documentation, experience supporting large projects or technical submittals preferred
Exposure to Data Centers or technical construction environments advantageous
Strong Microsoft Office skills (especially Excel, PowerPoint, Word)
Experience with technical documentation and submittal preparation, CRM systems (Salesforce preferred
Ability to work with technical calculations and project documentation
Fluent English mandatory; any additional European language is a plus
Travel within EMEA as required to support project execution and customer engagement (approx. 25–30%)


Additional Information


We offer intensive training and interesting perspectives for anyone who wants to build a career
Sika is like a global SME: With subsidiaries in more than 100 countries around the world. This begins in Switzerland and breaks down borders allowing exciting prospects all around the world
The chance to bring new ideas, interesting areas for development, and taking responsibility early on are some of the key factors that drive Sika's pioneering spirit

We look forward to your application. For this position visa sponsorship is not offered and only direct applications will be considered. For any further information please reach us at inbox.hr@ch.sika.com



We offer competitive salaries, aligned with local market benchmarks and the specific scope and responsibilities of each role. Compensation is determined based skills relevant to the position, education and/or training.  We are committed to fair and equitable pay practices in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.

Sie sorgen für zuverlässige Datenflüsse, automatisierte Reports und aussagekräftige Dashboards, die eine fundierte Workforce-Planung, Forecasting und portfolioübergreifende Entscheidungsfindung unterstützen.

Design und Wartung robuster Datenpipelines mit hoher Konsistenz und Datenqualität

Tools & Dashboard Development

Erstellung und Pflege von Power BI / Tableau-Dashboards für RCAP-Reporting (Capacity, Demand, Utilization, Risks)
Portfolio-Übersicht mit Drill-Down-Möglichkeiten nach Projekt, Funktion und Zeitraum
Bedarfsgerechte Aufbereitung der Kennzahlen für unterschiedliche Stakeholder

Automation & Reporting

Automatisierung von Datenextraktion, -transformation und Berichtsprozessen

Sicherstellung wiederholbarer, termintreuer und qualitativ hochwertiger Reports

Data Quality & Governance

Definition und Implementierung von Datenvalidierungsregeln und Qualitätschecks
Kontinuierliche Überwachung der Datenvollständigkeit aus Workforce- und Projektquellen

Analytics & Forecasting

Mitwirkung bei der Entwicklung von Workforce-Demand-Forecast-Modellen
Ermöglichung von Szenario-Simulationen und analytischen Auswertungen
Datenbasierte Unterstützung bei der Identifikation von Ressourcenrisiken

Zusammenarbeit

Enge Abstimmung mit dem Resource Manager bei der Einführung und Optimierung des RCAP-Frameworks
Mitverantwortung für die erfolgreiche Umsetzung aller RCAP-Deliverables


Ihr Profil


Abgeschlossenes Studium der (Wirtschafts-)Informatik, Data Analytics, Data Science, Ingenieurwissenschaften oder einer vergleichbaren Fachrichtung
5-10 Jahre Berufserfahrung im Bereich Data Analytics, Business Intelligence oder Systems Integration
Sehr gute Kenntnisse in SQL, Datenmodellierung und Data Pipelines
Fundierte Erfahrung mit BI-Tools, idealerweise Power BI oder Tableau
Praktische Erfahrung mit der Integration von Primavera P6, HR-Systemen oder ERP-Lösungen (von Vorteil)
Starke analytische und konzeptionelle Fähigkeiten
Fähigkeit, komplexe technische Lösungen verständlich für Fachabteilungen zu übersetzen
Ausgeprägte Kommunikationsstärke und strukturierte Arbeitsweise

18-monatige Arbeitnehmerüberlassung mit sehr hoher Übernahmechance
Direkte Zusammenarbeit mit Entscheidungsträgern und internationalem Team

description_full:
Our vision is to create a better future for businesses and talent - one hire at a time. We’re driven by our winning aspiration: to be the #1 provider of hires for our core customers, making this vision a reality.

To do this, we need you and your talents on our team. Become a part of HeyJobs and shape the future of recruiting with us! Join the HeyVolution!

For 9 years, we've been revolutionizing the recruitment market with our AI-based job platform. Our technology simplifies the path to a new job like never before and helps companies solve their skilled labor shortages.

With over 4,700 satisfied clients, including 8 of the top 10 largest employers in Germany and Austria, leading companies rely on HeyJobs for their recruiting. Last year alone, we helped over 100,000 people find their new jobs. Already, more than 1% of all hires occur through the HeyJobs platform.




We offer you an influential role in a fast-growing company:

As a Team Lead for Product Analytics, you will be at the forefront of our data-driven culture, leading a team of talented analysts to shape the future of our product. You won't just deliver analyses; you will define the analytical vision for your domain, own the team's shared roadmap, and take full ownership of the analytical outcomes that empower our product teams. Your leadership will be instrumental in elevating our analytical capabilities, fostering a culture of excellence, and evolving our operating model to increase strategic impact.

In this role, you can earn an annual target salary between 70.000 - 90.000 €. Your personal development and promotion opportunities are also guaranteed with us.




🎯 How you can contribute to HeyJobs

Lead & Develop a Winning Team: You will recruit, manage, and mentor a team of product analysts, fostering their professional growth and creating a productive, high-morale environment. You will own the team's shared roadmap, allocating analysts to the highest-impact initiatives based on business priorities.
Champion an AI-Powered Operating Model: You will spearhead the adoption of AI within our analytical workflows. Your focus will be on leveraging AI to automate routine tasks and create scalable self-service solutions for the organization, thereby freeing up your team's expert capacity for tackling the most complex, strategic business challenges and pioneering the AI discovery.
Define and Drive Analytical Strategy: You will own and shape business-critical analytical initiatives that accelerate our product strategy. As part of the product leadership you define your domain's long-term analytical vision and roadmap, moving beyond stakeholder requests to proactively identify and solve the most important business needs.
Evolve the Analytical Operating Model: You will guide the team through a strategic transition, shifting focus from reactive, ad-hoc requests to proactive, high-impact analysis. You will champion the development of scalable self-service solutions that empower the product organization, freeing up your team's capacity for the most complex and strategic analytical challenges.
Own Analytical Quality and Impact: You will be accountable for the quality and business impact of your team's entire output. This includes upholding high standards for experimentation and statistical rigor, ensuring data models and dashboards are built to last, and managing strategic stakeholders end-to-end to ensure insights translate directly into action.
Elevate our Data Infrastructure: You will guide the team in owning and improving critical parts of our analytics stack, including experimentation, reporting and data transformation models. You will ensure the team's work on tracking, instrumentation and data quality contributes to a reliable and scalable data foundation.




🤝 What sets you up for success

Significant experience in data analysis and a proven track record of leading complex, interdisciplinary analytical projects from inception to business impact.
Prior experience in a leadership or mentorship role, with a passion for developing talent and building high-performing teams.
A strong vision for the future of analytics, with experience or a deep interest in leveraging automation, advanced tooling, and AI to scale an analytics function and maximize its business impact.
Deep expertise in SQL and the modern data stack, including hands-on experience with dbt and data visualization tools like Tableau. Claude Code experience is a strong plus.
Strong, practical expertise in experimentation, including hypothesis formation, metric selection, and statistical evaluation. You know how to design and interpret A/B tests with high statistical rigor.
Demonstrated experience in managing senior stakeholders, with the ability to translate business needs into an analytical roadmap and communicate complex findings clearly and effectively.
A strategic mindset and the ability to think beyond execution, connecting analytical work to company-level objectives and proactively identifying opportunities for impact.
Fluent in German & English




❤️ What you will love about us

People & Values: We treat people in the way people should be treated, we bring out the best in everyone, we put our people first.
Transparent Communication & Recognition: Monthly All-Hands meetings, Q&A sessions with our Founders, and dedicated Slack channels for sharing updates and keep everyone connected.
Work-Life Balance: 28 holidays*, plus 1 additional day p.a., 3 weeks work from anywhere per year and a 1-month paid sabbatical* every 3 years, flexible work hours.
Growing individually and as a team: 7 step career framework, regular performance reviews, 3 days of yearly educational leave & 500€ budget*.
We take care of your health: 10 free nilo.health coaching sessions per year for your mental health & Urban Sports Club corporate rate.
Events & Feel Good initiatives: Fresh fruit, great drinks, company-wide end of year event, quarterly team events & plenty of feel good initiatives.
Great offices with high quality equipment: High-quality equipment tailored to your department, including a MacBook or ThinkPad, screen for home office + additional hardware; HQ Berlin (Kreuzberg, Paul-Lincke-Ufer) and HeyHub Cologne (Design Offices Gereon), all with standing desks, hybrid set-up meeting rooms & AC - good public transport connections & great lunch options.




At HeyJobs diversity and inclusion is key to creating a culture attracting the best talent and ultimately leading to achieving our vision. Together, we are 30 different nations, 45% women and 50% female leaders.

We are explicitly not hiring anyone who discriminates on the basis of religion, national origin, gender-identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, or any other aspect that makes you. We encourage individuals from LGBTQIA+ and other underrepresented groups to apply.

We are proud to have been continuously ranked as one of Berlin's best tech employers!

See for yourself: Top Startup Employer (German), Kununu, Glassdoor, Top 25 LinkedIn Startups.

Founded in Hamburg in 2007, we have quickly grown into a global company with offices in major cities such as London, New York, Berlin and Tokyo. And we still have a lot of plans. Your Tasks


Lead, mentor, and develop a team of Revenue Analysts, fostering a high-performance and data-driven culture
Own and continuously improve the global revenue analytics landscape, including reporting, dashboards, and KPI frameworks (PowerBI, Salesforce, DWH)
Own top-line revenue planning in close collaboration with Controlling, including annual budgeting, quarterly forecasting, and global revenue targets
Provide monthly performance updates to senior leadership (CLT), delivering clear insights and recommendations based on prior month performance

Drive revenue growth by identifying opportunities across the full sales and customer lifecycle
Collaborate closely with various teams and stakeholders like Sales, Revenue Operations, Finance, Data, Marketing, and Product

University degree in Business Administration, Economics, Data Science, Computer Science, or a comparable field

Work from abroad up to 30 calendar days a year
Hybrid work and flex-time
International team and social events
Subsidized urban mobility and access to fitness and wellness options
Free access to Langdock and all its amazing functionalities
Career & training opportunities

description_full:
Founded in 2017, refurbed is Europe’s fastest-growing marketplace for refurbished products, active in 12 European countries and having surpassed €2Bn in GMV — all while being profitable. With beautiful headquarters in Vienna, we operate as a remote-first company, and our 250+ employees enjoy up to two months of workation per year. We’ve also been recognised as a Top DACH Employer by Kununu for three consecutive years.




Our mission is to make sustainable consumption the easy choice by enabling customers to buy products up to 40% cheaper while significantly reducing CO₂ emissions.




If you thrive in an environment that values momentum, ownership, and impact, you’ll feel at home here. We’re a fast-paced, high-performance team that works hard and challenges itself everyday. To enable this high-performance every team member enjoys full autonomy over their location (we’re remote-first).




The Category and Sales Marketing Analyst will play a crucial role in supporting vouchers and promotion operations, multi-category growth, improving supply-demand alignment, and strengthening the commercial foundations needed for successful marketing strategies across multiple categories, markets, and performance channels.




This role will directly enable Refurbed’s expansion across categories, brands and countries by taking ownership of operational and analytical tasks.




You will work closely with Demand Planning, Category Managers, CRM, Performance Marketing (Search/Shopping, Paid Social, Affiliates), Product, and Commercial teams.




WHO YOU ARE
2–5 years experience in e-commerce, category management, marketing operations, performance marketing, or commercial strategy.
Strong analytical and data-handling skills; able to create clear insights from complex data.
Highly organized, reliable, and operationally strong.
Comfortable coordinating with multiple teams and managing parallel workstreams across categories, markets, and performance channels.
Proactive mindset with strong problem-solving skills.
Experience with consumer electronics / SDA is a plus.
Experience with promotions or marketplace operations preferred.
Bonus: performance marketing fundamentals (e.g., Search/Shopping, Paid Social, Affiliates)




Location & eligibility: This role is open to candidates based in Europe (including UK) only with a valid right to work.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

You drive multi-category growth. You support prioritization and budget allocation across categories and markets, turning demand-side insights (search, click data, pricing signals) into clear, actionable growth opportunities and structured recommendations.
You run promotions end-to-end. You execute voucher campaigns across markets, monitor performance and ROI, and continuously optimize based on supply relevance, cost efficiency, and commercial impact.
You connect Marketing and Supply. You align teams by consolidating forecasts, stock, pricing, and partner inputs, ensuring everyone works off the same priorities and timelines while contributing clear insights to business reviews.
You enable brands and partners. You maintain key KPIs, ensure data readiness for activation, and support smooth rollout of brand campaigns.
You scale how we work. You build tools, dashboards, and documentation that enable teams to be more self-serve, while identifying automation opportunities to reduce manual effort.
You support performance execution. You help translate category priorities into performance marketing channels (Search, Paid Social, Affiliates) and ensure campaigns are set up for success.




WHY YOU WILL ENJOY WORKING WITH US:

Our Culture and Values:

Decisions should be made based on facts and not by hierarchy levels? We sure think so!
We embrace giving and receiving feedback, testing and welcoming new ideas, as well as sharing our knowledge across the company.
You fail sometimes? Well, so do we! We’re all just human, let’s learn from our mistakes to improve in the future!
No matter who you love, where you’re from, who you pray to, whether you pee sitting down or standing up – we are a bunch of talented people who enjoy spending our time making a difference!

Personal & Professional Development:

You'll have access to a dedicated learning budget within your department to support your growth, whether it's courses, conferences, or other learning opportunities that matter to you.
We partner with Likeminded, offering you private sessions with experts for your personal growth and mental health.
We frequently host internal workshops, allowing our teams to further develop their skills in different areas and enhancing collaboration across departments.

Flexibility:

We care about a healthy work/life balance. We not only function and support a fully remote setting but also offer the possibility to work from our beautiful office in the vibrant heart of Vienna – we love dogs, so feel free to bring your furry little buddy too 😊
We trust you to do the best job, so we don't care so much when you do it – you are able to self-organize.
You will also be invited to take part in our office weeks, happening three times a year, where you will have the chance to work side by side with your colleagues and enjoy the team-building events and on-site workshops




…and much more! See https://careers.refurbed.com/ for further insights!

description_full:
Ready to take the lead on performance marketing and drive real business results? At Accel Club, we’re building a portfolio of successful global brands — and we’re looking for a Senior Performance Marketing Specialist (PPC) to take ownership of paid search strategy and execution.




In this role, you’ll manage campaigns end to end — optimizing performance, identifying growth opportunities, and ensuring our marketing investments translate into measurable impact. You’ll collaborate closely with operations, analytics, and creative teams to scale our brands efficiently and strategically.




💡 Experience with Amazon Ads is NOT required!

We’ll teach you everything you need — if you’ve run strong PPC campaigns on platforms like Google Ads or Microsoft Advertising, we encourage you to apply.




🚀 What We’re Looking For

Paid search is one of our core growth engines. It helps us attract the right customers and maximize sales across Amazon and other platforms — while improving organic visibility and long-term brand performance.




🏢 About Accel Club

Accel Club is a global consumer goods platform. We acquire and scale profitable e-commerce brands — primarily on Amazon — through operational expertise, data-driven decision-making, and high-performance marketing. With teams across Europe and North America, and a portfolio spanning dozens of brands, we’re building the consumer products platform of the future.




🧰 Advertising Platforms We Use

90% Amazon Ads
10% Other: Google Ads, Walmart Ads, Microsoft Advertising, etc.




🛒 Where We Attract Customers

Amazon product pages
Our own brand websites (DTC)




🎯 What You’ll Do

Own advertising tools such as Amazon Ads and Google Ads
Work with a high degree of autonomy and self-sufficiency
Cross-functionally collaborate with operations and growth teams to optimize landing pages, driving measurable increases in conversion rates.
Collaborate with other teams to establish an alignment on KPIs, ensuring holistic campaign performance with an emphasis on metrics like Margin, TACOS, Sales, etc.
Put forward new innovative ideas to test to drive performance improvements
Report results on a daily, weekly, and monthly basis




💡 What You Bring

Strong hands-on paid search experience on any advertising platform (Google Ads, Microsoft Advertising, or Amazon Ads)
Proficiency with Excel or Tableau/Power BI/Google Data Studio (data manipulation, basic formulas, making charts, pivot tables, and analyzing data)
Excellent attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously
Experience utilizing data to drive improvements
Ability to make technical requirements for analysts to automate the reports you need
Ability and understanding of how to scale advertising campaigns
Fluent English




🤝 About the Performance Marketing Team

We’re a group of performance marketing specialists with experience in e-commerce, fintech, travel, and beyond. From Amazon Ads and Google to Meta, TikTok, and affiliate platforms, we test and iterate constantly to uncover what works — and scale it fast.

Our culture is analytical, experimental, and results-driven. We love marketers who are curious, hungry to learn, and excited to make a measurable impact across diverse channels and brands.




🪄 Why You’ll Love It Here

Full ownership of performance marketing strategy and execution
The chance to drive tangible business outcomes, fast
Access to a global portfolio of products and advertising platforms
Flexible hybrid or remote work setup
Data-driven, collaborative, and growth-focused culture




✅ Benefits

B2B contract with our US entity
€50 monthly healthcare allowance
25 business days of paid vacation + public holidays based on your location

Product Strategy & Execution:


Analyze market demand and competitive dynamics to develop category strategies and product portfolios. Coordinate procurement and supply chain resources to optimize product structure and inventory efficiency.


Market Insights & Strategy Development:


Research industry trends and consumer behavior to design pricing strategies and promotional campaigns. Enhance product competitiveness and achieve profitability targets.


Supply Chain Collaboration:


Collaborate with cross-functional teams across the supply chain to optimize product scheduling and launch plans, ensuring efficient inventory turnover and operational agility.


Data Governance & Business Intelligence:


Establish a data monitoring framework to analyze sales performance, cost structures, and profit margins. Provide actionable insights for decision-making and drive data-driven operational precision.


Innovation & Business Model Exploration:


Leverage industry best practices to pioneer new collaborative scenarios and innovative business models, expanding market share and strengthening industry leadership.

【About JD.com】

JD.com (NASDAQ: JD and HKEX: 9618), also known as JINGDONG, is a leading supply chain-based technology and service provider. The company’s cutting-edge retail infrastructure seeks to enable consumers to buy whatever they want, whenever and wherever they want it. The company has opened its technology and infrastructure to partners, brands and other sectors, as part of its "Retail as a Service" offering to help drive productivity and innovation across a range of industries. JD.com’s business has expanded across retail, technology, logistics, health, industrials, property development and international business. JD.com is ranked 44th on the Fortune Global 500 list and is China’s largest retailer by revenue, serving over 600 million annual active customers. The company has been listed on NASDAQ since 2014, and on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange since 2020. Committed to the principles of customer first, innovation, dedication, ownership, gratitude, and integrity, the company's mission is to make lives better through technology, striving to be the most trusted company in the world.

【Our Global Business】

We are dedicated to building a digitally intelligent, cross-border supply chain and global retail infrastructure. Leveraging our global supply chain capabilities, JD.com continues to expand in markets where our competitive strengths shine. Currently, JD.com's operations span China, the U.K., the Netherlands, France, Germany, Spain, Brazil, Hungary, Japan, South Korea, Australia, Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, Indonesia, Saudi Arabia, the UAE, the U.S., and many others, serving customers worldwide.

Key International Business Segments: Joybuy (online retail business in Europe), International Logistics, Cross-border Import Business, JD Industrials International, JD Property International

【"Joybuy" - Online Retail Business in Europe】

Joybuy is JD.com's online retail business in Europe. It is currently in the test phase in the UK, the Netherlands, Germany, France, Belgium, and Luxembourg. Joybuy places the customer at the heart of everything it does. Our slogan, “Don’t just buy, Joybuy,” perfectly captures our mission to fulfill our customers’ needs and provide a service that is easy and convenient, but also enjoyable and fun.

The
description_full:
When travelers are searching for a hotel, we want the obvious choice to be trivago! Our leading metasearch engine is super fast and constantly optimized - enabling millions of travelers to compare hotel prices from hundreds of booking sites and find great deals in just a few clicks. We use cutting-edge technology, real-time auction, and machine learning techniques with petabytes of data to create an experience - time and money saved! In the lively city of Düsseldorf, we seize opportunities to learn everyday, innovate, and make an enduring mark on the travel industry. At trivago you will find those who aren’t afraid of change but rather embrace it, turning every challenge into a pathway for growth. Join trivago, work with a great team, and grow with us!

Join us in making a difference


The Marketing Strategy and Intelligence team at trivago is a unique blend of business and data roles, driving strategic decisions in marketing through data insights, innovative products, and deep market understanding. As the Strategy and Growth Manager, you will be dedicated to uncovering new growth opportunities and delivering business value through financial planning, controlling, performance and opportunity analysis, as well as project management and execution of strategic cross-functional initiatives.

In this role, you will collaborate with data and business experts on projects that impact every aspect of trivago's operations.

How you’ll make an impact:



Financial Management & Performance Optimization: Drive financial modeling and planning across markets — building robust models, leading marketing P&L forecasting and controlling processes, and continuously identifying optimization opportunities to maximize revenue and contribution margin growth.
Opportunity Identification & Validation: Collaborate closely with marketing teams to identify and define growth opportunities, build supporting business cases, and validate hypotheses through structured experimentation and testing frameworks.
Strategic Coordination: Drive strategic initiatives end-to-end, partnering with Business Units on strategy formation and quarterly objective-setting by providing a holistic view of the business.
Insight Delivery: Deliver structured, actionable insights from a cross-channel perspective — challenging the status quo and surfacing opportunities that others may overlook.
Senior Stakeholder Management: Manage alignment with functional leads and senior leadership, ensuring the team's analytical output translates into meaningful business actions and decisions.
Cross-Functional Project Leadership: Lead a diverse portfolio of strategic projects spanning multiple business units, driving execution from concept through impact measurement.
Data-Driven Strategy: Partner with Data Analysts and Scientists to convert data insights into holistic marketing strategies, maximizing business value.



What you'll need to thrive:



Experience: 3+ years of relevant experience in strategic, financial, or analytical roles within a digital/tech environment.
Education: A Bachelor's degree or higher in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, Econometrics, Statistics, or similar.
Business Acumen: Deep understanding of how diverse user acquisition strategies, channel economics, and marketing investments drive revenue and contribution margin growth in a test-and-learn framework.
Stakeholder Management: Proven ability to build trust and influence with senior leaders and cross-functional partners, driving alignment and converting analytical output into business action.
Data-Driven Decision Making: Proficiency in using a data-driven approach to identify business opportunities and make strategic decisions.
Strategic Mindset: Ability to operate at both the macro and micro level — zooming out to see full business implications while diving deep into the details when needed.
Analytical Skills: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Data Storytelling: Excellent data storytelling skills with compelling and easily understandable narratives for a wide range of audiences, including executives.



Stand out with:



Financial Fluency: Strong command of financial modeling, planning, and analysis — including P&L management, scenario modeling, and marketing spend optimization. Ability to translate financial data into actionable strategic recommendations.
Project Management: Excellent project management skills, particularly in agile methodologies.
Experience with Digital Marketing Channels: Familiarity with various digital marketing channels and strategies.
Proactive Ownership: High level of motivation, structured working style, and a track record of independently driving initiatives from idea to impact.



Worried about missing a few requirements? Still apply, and express your motivation as you may just be the right candidate for this or other roles!

Recruiting process for this role:



One-way interview
Call with recruiter
Case Study Presentation + technical interview
Interview with Stakeholders from marketing



What you can look forward to:

As you grow, so do we.


This is why at trivago, we prioritize your development, offer personalized coaching through Nilo, and provide workshops, educational meetups, conferences, free online learning courses, and access to a fully-equipped campus library.

Moving to join us?


No problem. You can count on the visa support from our talent support team, a relocation package, interest-free newcomer loan, free language classes, regular team and company-wide events to build experiences together.

Life happens.


We offer self-determined vacation (with a minimum of 25 vacation days), flexible working hours, up to 2 work from home days weekly. Additionally you can work remotely from a different location, within Germany or selected countries abroad for up to 20 days per year. You also get free access to the Heycare platform for personalized nanny assistance, and an on-campus kids room.

Enjoy your office days.


Use your daily canteen budget to share lunch with colleagues in our canteen, help yourself to complimentary snacks and drinks in our kitchens, choose from a variety of fitness options with our on-site gym, sports classes, and Urban Sports Club membership, and enjoy the comfort of ergonomic desks and focused work areas.

Thank you for considering a career at trivago! Our commitment to fostering an inclusive and enriching environment for all talents is at the heart of what we do. We understand that embarking on a new job opportunity is a blend of excitement and curiosity. Should any questions arise before you apply, feel free to reach out to us at joinus@trivago.com. Join us in our mission to make a positive impact on global travel, we look forward to your application!

description_full:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to Know our Team:

The Performance Marketing Team of Agoda is a world leader in online marketing. This department is highly data-driven and focused on developing at-scale marketing programs that improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers through measurable marketing programs and channels. The team is a blend of the best analysts, marketing strategists, and data scientists in the world. The marketing leadership at Agoda have deep experience in data science, product, strategy, and other marketing fields and have built an organization that thrives on data, creative ideas, and technology. The Performance Marketing Team also fosters a great learning environment. You will be able to learn and grow by working closely with experts from a variety of backgrounds from all over the world.

In this Role, you’ll get to:


Search: Experiment with text ads, bidding, and campaign structures on Google, Bing, Baidu, Naver, and other search engines. Adapt to new product features and roll out changes from successful tests.
Display: Test, analyze, and optimize campaigns on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, and others.
Modeling: Analyze the vast amounts of data generated by experiments, develop models we can use for optimization, and build dashboards for account managers.


What you’ll Need to Succeed:


Bachelor’s Degree or higher from top university in a quantitative subject (computer science, mathematics, engineering, or science)
Ability to communicate fluently in English
2+ years’ experience in top-tier management consulting, investment banking, private equity, or strategy/business operations for a fast-growing globally operating tech company
Exposure to one or more data analysis packages or databases, e.g., SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA, SQL
Good numerical reasoning skills
Proficiency in Excel
Intellectual curiosity


It’s Great if you Have:


Experience in digital marketing
Academic research experience

description_full:
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in around 65 countries worldwide powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt. No matter where you're from or what you believe in, we build, we deliver, we lead. We are Delivery Hero.

Job Description

We are on the lookout for a Senior Pricing Analyst, Product Operations (Global Pricing) to join the Pricing Team on our journey to always deliver amazing experiences.

As a Senior Pricing Analyst, Product Operationswithin the Global Pricing Team, you will sit at the intersection of Product & Business. You will be responsible for analyzing and optimizing how we charge for our services—balancing customer affordability with sustainable unit economics. Your mission is to support the specification, testing, rollout & ongoing operation of pricing features (like Small Order Fees, Service Fees, and Delivery Fee ladders) and provide the insights needed to scale these globally.


Feature Impact Modeling & Forecasting: Based on your conversations with the different pricing teams in Delivery Hero, you will own the "Business Case" for new pricing product requirements. You will build predictive models to estimate the impact of proposed features (e.g., MOV adjustments, service fees) on key metrics like GPO, Conversion Rate, and Order Frequency before they hit the roadmap.
Accountability & Performance Tracking: Lead the testing efforts & rollout analysis for all new pricing features. You will hold stakeholders accountable to adopt new features and compare actual performance against the initial impact estimations, identifying "value leakage" and recommending data-backed pivots.
Strategic Stakeholder Management: Partner with Global Marketing and Regional Ops leads to translate business visions into actionable product requirements. You will refine and challenge stakeholder requests to ensure we are prioritizing high-impact initiatives which benefit the whole organisation.
Pricing Product Operations: Support the day-to-day "Product Ops" side of pricing by monitoring the health of fee structures globally, for example identifying an opportunity to change the distance-based fee increases. This also includes answering questions of the end-users of our product on a daily basis regarding best practices and how to set up a specific pricing strategy within the product.
Advanced Visualization & Tooling: Build accessible, creative, and engaging data visualizations in Tableau/BigQuery to facilitate access to insights. You will own the "Value Tracker" that aggregates incremental revenue generated by pricing features across all regions.
Data Stewardship & Governance: Own the data catalog for all Pricing dimensions, metrics, and KPIs. Collaborate with Data Engineering and Product to ensure that experiment data, fee points, and subsidies are correctly logged and scalable.


Qualifications


3+ years experience as a Product or Pricing Analyst within a fast-paced marketplace or e-commerce environment.
Mastery of BigQuery and SQL is essential with the ability to build Python-based modeling pipelines and experience with GitHub.
Strong grasp of applied statistics, specifically for A/B testing and price elasticity modeling.
Deep understanding of unit economics (CAC, LTV, GPO, and Contribution Margin). You can explain why a $200 increase in a fee matters to the bottom line.
Fluent in English with the ability to translate complex data into a narrative for non-technical stakeholders in Marketing and Product.
Experience with Airflow for data pipeline management and familiarity with Google Analytics/Amplitude to track the customer checkout funnel.


Additional Information

Ensuring you and all our Heroes are looked after, happy, and healthy is always on the menu. Because if you’re in good shape, then we’re in good shape.


Make the most of our hybrid working model and join the team for face-to-face connection and collaboration in our beautiful Berlin campus 2 days a week
We offer 27 days holiday with an extra day on 2nd and 3rd year of service
We will support you in developing yourself and your career growth opportunities: 1.000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support and access to the Udemy Business platform to explore a variety of online courses.
Get moving and release those wonderful, mind-boosting endorphins: Health Checkups, Meditation, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy
Cash. Dough. Cheddar. Whatever you call it, we’ll help you with it: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan
The power of getting together over some food is unrivaled. Here are a few ways to help you do that. All the yum: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts. Courses.

description_full:
About The Team

Salmon Customer Service — a team that makes our customers' lives easier across every product in the company. We build a universal, scalable service layer: clear support flows, smart tools, shared standards, and solutions that work for all products. Our goal is simple: remove friction, help people solve their tasks quickly, and create a service experience that truly feels wow.

About The Role

This role owns the service layer for Salmon's Deposits and Daily Banking products. As we launch and scale the deposit business, we need someone who turns every new feature, rule, or policy into a clear, reliable, user-oriented customer service process — and keeps that service running smoothly day to day. The role combines analytical thinking, operational clarity, and cross-team collaboration to make sure our deposits service is reliable, scalable, and continuously improving.

You'll be the key link between Product, Operations, and CS — ensuring that every new feature, rule, or policy is translated into user-oriented customer service processes.

Responsibilities

Process Design & Documentation


Map and document how customer requests within Deposits and Daily Banking are handled (by agents or bots)
Create and maintain step-by-step flows and BPMN diagrams for core and edge cases
Ensure clarity, accuracy, and relevance of all processes over time


Launch & Change Readiness


Prepare the Customer Service team for new product launches, policy updates, and new tools within the Deposits and Daily Banking scope
Translate business and product changes into concrete CS actions (scripts, macros, workflows)
Build project plans, align with other teams, and ensure timely implementation
Proactively surface risks and blockers and work across teams to resolve them


Execution & Quality Control


Monitor whether requests are handled as designed
Track key metrics (handling time, satisfaction, process adherence, SLAs)
Identify root causes for deviations and address them with the relevant teams
Handle incidents and escalations within the deposits scope


Continuous Improvement & Alignment


Propose and drive changes to simplify or improve customer processes
Sync with Business, Product, Training, and QA to ensure alignment
Collaborate with Data Analysts to measure the impact of improvements
Coordinate across CS, Product, Engineering, Risk, Compliance, and other departments on the deposit customer journey


Requirements


2+ years of experience as a business analyst, service lead, process analyst, or similar role in fintech, banking, BPO, or a digital company (Customer Support background is a strong plus)
Prior experience in fast-paced environments (fintech, tech, BPO, e-commerce)
Experience in describing and optimizing business processes — proficient in BPMN and tools like Lucidchart or Draw.io
Ability to work with data: basic SQL, experience with BI dashboards (Metabase, Looker, Tableau, or similar)
Understanding of CRM systems and ticketing platforms
Strong project coordination and stakeholder management skills
Analytical, structured, and detail-oriented mindset
Experience working across multiple teams or departments
English B2+ (English-speaking work environment)


Additional Requirements / Preferences


Experience in a regulated environment (banking, microfinance, payment systems)
Background in deposits, current accounts, cards, payments, or daily banking products
Experience with Jira / Confluence
Understanding of self-service and proactive customer communication concepts
Experience launching new products or features from a service-operations perspective

The Global Omnichannel Customer Engagement Lead will be responsible for delivering seamless and engaging experiences for healthcare professionals (HCPs) and other key stakeholders across all platforms, accelerating brand engagement and topline growth. This role is Global (Ex US) with a focus on EU and International Regions. The successful candidate will work in close collaboration with global cross functional and affiliates teams. This is a hands-on role requiring deep digital and omnichannel experience within the pharmaceutical industry. You should be confident to work independently in a matrix management environment, developing impactful customer journeys, high quality content and engaging affiliates in effective deployment across channels. Experience in rep triggered and blast emails, webinar platforms, HCPs portals, content tagging, Veeva and KAM orchestration are extremely important. The ability to communicate to stakeholders at all levels with clarity and vision is a must. Sobi is a dynamic environment which requires individuals that can work at pace and scale. This role provides tremendous opportunity to shape the digital and omnichannel roadmap for Sobi.

Key Responsibilities


Aligned to brand strategy, develop omnichannel plans, and advise on approach to campaign execution across markets
Develop and roll out best practice guidance to affiliates to deploy and execute campaigns effectively driving impact for the brands
Collaborate with cross functional teams (both commercial and non-commercial) to create personalized journeys based on customer preference data and brand objectives with simple and impactful KPIs
Develop omnichannel guidance and governance through playbooks, training and resources to support the business to execute in a consistent and impactful manner
Be seen as an SME championing strong customer engagement though omnichannel strategies
Build digital content ensuring consistent messaging, visuals and positioning across all channels and platforms
Support brand teams with their communication and messaging goals across non personal channels
Enhance and evolve Sobi’s HCP portal (SobiPro), incorporating industry best practices
Co-create channel capability with global and affiliate colleagues, providing strategic guidance
Set clear KPI’s and monitor campaigns to track performance and suggest enhancements
Support line manager to develop omnichannel and digital roadmap for the region(s)
Proactively assess future trends in customer engagement to accelerate our capability and provide Sobi with a competitive edge
Operate with high ethical standards in line with the Sobi corporate values and SOPs by ensuring ongoing completion of all required initial and ongoing training in local regulations and policies, and adherence to those regulations and policies


This is a highly networked role, with a requirement to work cross-functionally and cross-company.

Qualifications


University degree level education –Marketing, Engineering, Data or Computer Science
Digital/omnichannel experience at regional or global, including leading extensive digital projects within the pharmaceutical industry
Additional commercial experiences including sales, marketing and business intelligence
Experience in Cardiometabolic disorders is desirable
Proficient with CRM ecosystems such as Veeva
Data driven with strong data and analytics skills, Qlick/Power BI
Desirable experience in data flows/warehouse
Experienced in marketing automation across different customer segments
Ability to communicate complex digital strategies in simple, compelling narratives
Cross-cultural leadership, effective communication and team working skills
Multi stakeholder project management and leadership experience, delivering results on time and within budget
Flexibility, ability to manage change and operate in an environment of uncertainty
Fluency in written and spoken English
Additional European language skill is desirable


Additional Information

Please note:

As this role carries global responsibilities and can be based across Europe, it is published in several countries. You only need to submit one application — there is no need to apply separately to each posting.

Gesundheitsförderung: Wir stärken dich und deine Gesundheit mit Hansefit, Massagen und Sportevents
Wertschätzung und Teamgeist: Wir nutzen jede Gelegenheit, um gemeinsam unsere kleinen und großen Erfolge zu feiern


Was erwartet dich?


Du analysierst Kunden-, Nutzungs- und Kampagnendaten und leitest daraus konkrete, operative Insights ab
Du entwickelst und setzt Zielgruppenanalysen, Selektionen und Segmentierungen um
Du bewertest die Wirkung unserer Kommunikations- und Direktmarketingmaßnahmen anhand relevanter Kennzahlen
Du entwickelst Selektionslogiken, Modelle und Algorithmen kontinuierlich weiter
Du erstellst aussagekräftige Reportings und Präsentationen zur Kampagnen- und Kommunikationsperformance und ordnest diese in übergeordnete Customer-Experience- und Wirkungszusammenhänge ein

Du hast ein abgeschlossenes Studium im wirtschaftswissenschaftlichen, betriebswirtschaftlichen oder vergleichbaren Bereich

Du bringst ein sehr gutes Zahlenverständnis mit und hast Freude daran, analytisch und strukturiert zu arbeiten
Du interessierst dich für Customer Experience, Kundenkommunikation und datenbasierte Steuerung
Du kannst Analyseergebnisse verständlich aufbereiten und in konkrete Handlungsempfehlungen übersetzen
Du gehst sicher mit MS Office sowie gängigen Analyse- und Marketing-Tools um (z. B. BSI, Formware, Datenbank- oder BI-Tools) und bist offen für den Einsatz KI-gestützter Analyseverfahren sowie neuer datengetriebener Technologien
Nach Eingang deiner Bewerbung wird diese vom Recruiting und vom Fachbereich geprüft
Sollte deine Bewerbung uns überzeugen, erhältst du eine Einladung zu einem Videointerview
Nach positiven Erstinterview wirst du zu einem Zweitgespräch/Hospitation vor Ort eingeladen

description_full:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to know our team:

The Marketing team at Agoda is highly data-driven and focused on developing at-scale, measurable marketing programs designed to improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers. The team combines a blend of the best analysts, marketing strategists and data scientists, collectively building a team that thrives on data, creative ideas and technology. . The Marketing leadership fosters a great learning environment, providing the opportunity to learn and grow by working closely with experts from a diverse variety of backgrounds from across the globe.

Due to continued expansion, there are multiple analyst roles within the marketing team across different marketing channels. While the scope will vary depending on these channels, here are some examples:


Experimentation and optimizing campaign performance: Experiment with ads/campaign structures and bidding& pricing strategies on partners such as Google, Bing, Tripadvisor, Trivago and other search engines. Adapt to new product features and roll out changes from successful tests.
Modeling: Analyze vast amounts of data generated by experiments, develop predictive models using data science techniques (eg. understanding impact on bookings from large scale TV campaigns or demand elasticity from pricing optimization) and liaise with product teams on implementation roadmap
Reporting, analysis and insights: Building dashboards to track performance, derive insights, understand growth levers and communicate recommendations via presentations to stakeholders


What you’ll Need to Succeed:


Bachelor’s degree or higher from top university in a quantitative subject (computer science, mathematics, engineering business or science)
Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English
2+ years experience in data crunching from top-tier consulting, investment banking, private equity or strategy/business for a fast-growing globaltech company
Experience in one or more data analysis packages or databases, eg., SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA, SQL and visualization tools, eg. Tableau, Power BI
Ability to move fast and be efficient, making decisions on objective evidence rather than subjective gut feel
Innate desire to take ownership, make an impact and influence outcomes
Excellent organizational skills, attention to detail and ability to work independently


It’s great if you have:


Experience in digital marketing or ecommerce
Experience with A/B testing and other testing metrics
Strong presentation and negotiation skills
Skills that foster collaboration and team spirit

description_full:
At Statista, we’re all about facts and data, for we are the world's leading business data platform. By providing reliable and easy-to-use data as well as various data analytics products and services, we empower people worldwide to make fact-based decisions.

Founded in Hamburg in 2007, we have quickly grown into a global company with offices in major cities such as London, New York, Berlin and Tokyo. And we still have a lot of plans. Our constant growth does not only prove our success, but also keeps creating new development and career opportunities for our employees.

We value and celebrate our diverse culture. You are welcome here for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or whether you prefer bar graphs to pie charts. Your story matters – keep writing it as part of our team.

Are you ready to join us?

Your Team

At Statista R, our team of over 130 analysts and sales specialists creates, publishes and distributes globally renowned company and brand toplists as well as rankings for a wide range of industries. As experts in rating companies, brands and products, we use our independent market research and data analysis expertise to identify the best in their respective industries, creating transparency and trust. Learn more at r.statista.com.

Your Job


Contribute to multifaceted international media cooperation projects
Analyze e-commerce companies and online platforms, including their business models and performance metrics
Research and analyze internal and external primary and secondary data to assess company performance and develop rankings
Support the creation of international marketing campaigns in the rankings environment
Assist in planning and executing company outreach campaigns (e.g. email campaigns)
Prepare clear and structured presentations of results in PowerPoint and Excel
Collaborate with the team to develop the best approaches for our projects


Your Profile


Completed studies in economics, business administration, marketing or a related field (Bachelor/Master)
Strong interest in e-commerce markets, digital platforms and online business models
First practical experience in marketing, outreach or campaign management (e.g. internships, student jobs or early professional experience)
Experience with email campaigns, mass mailings or direct company outreach is a strong plus
Very good knowledge of Excel and PowerPoint; experience with data tools or programming (e.g. Python, R or SQL) is a plus
Excellent written and spoken English; German or additional languages are a plus
High level of initiative, reliability and attention to detail, with the ability to work both independently and in a team


What We Offer

In addition to our great team, culture, and our shared goal of empowering people with data, there are many other things that make Statista a great place to work! Join us and benefit from:


Work from abroad up to 30 calendar days a year
Hybrid work and flex-time
International team and social events
Subsidized urban mobility and access to fitness and wellness options
Free access to Langdock and all its amazing functionalities
Career & training opportunities
Attractive locations and modern offices
Mental health support with OpenUp

description_full:
Bei der Aktion Mensch erhebst und analysierst du nicht nur Daten – du bewegst mit deinen Erkenntnissen etwas wirklich Sinnvolles. Du erkennst, was hinter Zahlen steckt, machst deren Business-Relevanz sichtbar und legst damit die Grundlage für strategische Entscheidungen mit echter Wirkung.




Tu, was du liebst

Im dreiköpfigen Team, das eine Stabsstelle beim Vorstand ist, bist du als Senior-Expert*in dafür verantwortlich, zu analysieren, welche Projekte Inklusion tatsächlich verbessern, wie erfolgreich Lotteriekampagnen sind und wo Förderung die größte Wirkung entfaltet – und leitest daraus gezielt Maßnahmen für maximale gesellschaftliche Wirkung ab.




Du erkennst die strategische Relevanz von Marktdaten und Insights, übersetzt diese in belastbare, entscheidungsrelevante Empfehlungen und lieferst damit die Grundlage für eine wirkungsvolle Markt- und Markenstrategie.
Du verantwortest die End-to-End-Konzeption, Planung und Steuerung anspruchsvoller Marktforschungsprojekte entlang zentraler Business-Fragestellungen – von Marke, Kommunikation und Kampagnen bis hin zu Förderung, Pricing und Produkt.
Als zentrale Ansprechperson und Sparringspartner*in berätst du interne Stakeholder auf allen Ebenen (u. a. Lotterie, Förderung, Kampagne, Kommunikation) zu marktforschungsrelevanten Fragestellungen und entwickelst passgenaue, methodisch fundierte Studiendesigns–von pragmatischen Set-ups bis hin zu komplexen, multimethodalen Ansätzen.
Du analysierst Primär- und Sekundärdaten mit hoher methodischer Sicherheit, identifizierst zentrale Treiber und Muster und übersetzt diese in klare, entscheidungsrelevante Handlungsempfehlungen.
Du bereitest Insights zielgruppenspezifisch auf und sorgst für maximale Wirkung – in Management-Präsentationen, Workshops sowie in strukturierten Reporting-Formaten.
Du priorisierst Projekte entlang strategischer Relevanz, triffst fundierte methodische Entscheidungen und stellst eine hohe Qualität, Effizienz und Termintreue in der Umsetzung sicher.
Die unternehmensweiten Marktforschungsstandards entwickelst du weiter, etablierst eine zukunftsfähige Forschungsarchitektur und treibst deren Umsetzung voran.
Du dentifizierst relevante Markt- und Methoden-Trends, evaluierstinnovative Ansätze und initiierst Pilotprojekte– insbesondere im Hinblick auf den Einsatzneuer Technologien wie KI in der Marktforschung.
Du steuerst Marktforschungsinstitute und Dienstleister, verantwortest Budgets und stellst Transparenz sowie Controlling sicher.
Du gibstjuniorigenKolleg*innen fachliche Orientierung und arbeitest eng mit interdisziplinären Teams zusammen.

Tech Stack: Zeotap Customer Data Platform, Holistics BI, Google Analytics 4, Tealium iQ, EasyFeedback, GetFeedback, SPSS




Zeig, was du kannst

Deine Leidenschaft ist die Marktforschung und du bringst mehrjährige (ca.4–6+Jahre) fundierte Erfahrung in der betrieblichen Marktforschung, im Insights-Umfeld oder auf Agenturseite mit und verstehst es, Forschung konsequent an Business- und Wirkungszielen auszurichten.
Du verfügst über ein sehr breites und tiefes Methodenverständnis – sowohl im quantitativen als auch im qualitativen Bereich – und wählst je nach Fragestellung souverän den passenden methodischen Ansatz.
Du hast nachweislich Erfahrung in der Steuerung komplexer Marktforschungsprojekte – inklusive Budgetverantwortung, Dienstleistersteuerung und Qualitätssicherung.
Du überzeugst durch ausgeprägte analytische Stärke und die Fähigkeit, Daten in fundierte, strategisch relevante Handlungsempfehlungen zu übersetzen.
Du agierst sicher auf Augenhöhe mit unterschiedlichen Stakeholdern und bringst ausgeprägte Beratungs-, Moderations- und Kommunikationskompetenz mit.
Du verfolgst aktiv neue Entwicklungen in Marktforschung, Methoden und Technologien (z. B. datengetriebene Ansätze, Automatisierung, KI) und hast Freude daran, diese konzeptionell weiterzudenken und einzusetzen.
Du arbeitest strukturiert, eigenverantwortlich und priorisierst souverän in einem dynamischen, anspruchsvollen Umfeld.
Du hast ein abgeschlossenes Hochschulstudium, z. B. in Marktforschung, Wirtschaft‑oder Sozialwissenschaften, Psychologie, Marketing oder einem vergleichbaren Studiengang.




Unser Erfolgsrezept: Das WIR gewinnt

Ein Job, in dem man mit viel Spaß und freier Zeiteinteilung Gutes tun kann. Gleitzeit oder mobiles Arbeiten unterstützen dabei, Beruf und Privatleben zu vereinbaren (60 %mobiles Arbeitund 40 % Büropräsenz).
Persönliche und fachliche Weiterentwicklung durch individuelle Fortbildungen, Coaching, Leadership-Programme, Masterplan und Entwicklungspläne.
Positives, offenes und freundliches Arbeitsumfeld. Wertschätzende❤️-Atmosphäre, klare Führung und die Möglichkeit, aus Fehlern zu lernen, sind selbstverständlich sowie ein nachhaltiges Arbeitsumfeld.
Eine moderne IT-Ausstattung, barrierefreie Arbeitsplätze, technische Hilfen, ein Leitsystem gehören ganz selbstverständlich dazu und ermöglichen ein entspanntes, professionelles Arbeiten. Assistenzen und Assistenzhunde sind ebenso selbstverständlich willkommen und Teil unseres täglichen Miteinanders.
Attraktives Gehalt,6,7 % Erfolgsbeteiligung (vom Jahresbruttogehalt), kostenfreies Deutschlandticket, umfangreiche Sozialleistungen (zusätzliches Kindergeld, betriebliche Altervorsorge etc.)
Urban Sports Mitgliedschaft, kostenloser PKW & Fahrrad-Parkplatz in unserer Tiefgarage, kostenloser Fahrradverleih, Fahrgemeinschaften.
29 Urlaubstage (plus: Rosenmontag, Heiligabend, Silvester)
Schau bei Kununu: Aktion Mensch e.V. als Arbeitgeber

Über uns

Inklusion ist unser Herzensanliegen. Als größte private Förderorganisation begeistern wir die Menschen für eine Gesellschaft, in der Unterschiede normal sind. Auch in unserem Unternehmen leben wir Vielfalt. Mit 280 Kolleg*innen arbeiten wir jeden Tag daran, dass Menschen mit und ohne Behinderung selbstverständlich zusammenleben können. Bewerbungen von Menschen mit Behinderung sind bei uns willkommen! Du möchtest dabei sein und gemeinsam mit uns die Welt von morgen gestalten?

description_full:
Vollgas nicht nur auf der Straße – sondern auch mit uns im Job!

Die Stellantis Germany GmbH ist Teil des weltweiten Automobilkonzerns Stellantis N.V.

In Deutschland ist die Stellantis Germany GmbH aus den beiden Unternehmensteilen

FCA Germany GmbH und Groupe PSA Deutschland GmbH hervorgegangen. Unter dem Dach von Stellantis werden die Marken Abarth, Alfa Romeo, Citroën, DS Automobiles, Fiat, Fiat Professional (leichte Nutzfahrzeuge), Jeep®, Leapmotor, Opel und Peugeot vertrieben.




Der/die Market Funnel Performance Manager:in verantwortet die Full-Funnel-Performance im jeweiligen Markt und stellt eine enge Verzahnung zwischen regionalen Standards und marktspezifischen Anforderungen sicher. Die Rolle aktiviert regionale Methodiken, Dashboards und KPIs und adaptiert die Umsetzung entlang des lokalen Konsumentenverhaltens, der Channel-Realität sowie der Business-Dynamik.

Sie/Er stellt sicher, dass Performance-Entscheidungen im Markt datengetrieben erfolgen – mit regionalem Reporting als primärem Framework, angereichert um kontextuelle lokale Insights.

Zudem speist die Rolle Markt-Learnings zurück, um regionale Playbooks, Benchmarks und zukünftige Guidelines weiterzuentwickeln.




Kernaufgaben

1. Full-Funnel-Ownership für den Markt

Steuert die Markt-Performance über alle Funnel-Stufen hinweg:
Awareness → Consideration → Intent → Conversion → Loyalty.
Übersetzt regionale Frameworks in marktrelevante Strategien.
Priorisiert Performance-Treiber basierend auf Markt-Insights, Wettbewerbsumfeld und Funnel-Diagnostik.




2. Alignment mit regionalen Standards & Tools

Implementiert regionale KPI-Definitionen, Methodiken, Dashboards und Governance-Prozesse.
Stellt sicher, dass der Markt regionale Test-Frameworks, Messstandards und Reporting-Zyklen konsequent anwendet.
Arbeitet mit regionalen Teams an der Weiterentwicklung von Benchmarks, Target-Setting und Methodik-Updates.




3. Markt-Insights als Input für regionale Teams

Liefert strukturierte Markt-Insights, Performance-Treiber, Test-Learnings und Business-Kontext.
Hebt marktspezifische Besonderheiten hervor, die Funnel-KPIs und Optimierungsansätze beeinflussen.
Gestaltet zukünftige regionale Guidelines durch Feedback aus der lokalen Umsetzung mit.




4. Funnel-Optimierung & cross-funktionale Steuerung

Leitet Funnel-Diagnostik und Maßnahmenpläne über Media, LFAs, CRM, Markt- und Brand-Teams hinweg.
Steuert Agenturen zur Optimierung von Creatives, Audiences, Customer Journeys und Conversion-Flows.
Treibt A/B-Testing im Einklang mit regionalen Protokollen – zugeschnitten auf lokale Kanäle.




5. Business-Governance & Reporting

Stellt sicher, dass regionale Dashboards als Single Source of Truth für Market Business Reviews genutzt werden.
Unterstützt Management-Entscheidungen durch KPI-Interpretation und lokalen Performance-Kontext.
Bereitet marktbezogene Insights für wöchentliche, monatliche und quartalsweise Performance-Reviews auf.




6. Budgetsteuerung & Forecasting

Wendet regionale Media-Forecasting-Modelle an – angereichert um lokale Marktindikatoren.
Überwacht Spend-Effizienz und empfiehlt Budget-Reallokationen entlang der Funnel-Stufen.
Treibt die Steigerung der Conversion-Effizienz.




Zentrale Funnel-KPIs

(Im Einklang mit regionalen Definitionen – angewendet im jeweiligen Markt-Kontext)

Awareness: Reach, CPR, Traffic-Qualität
Consideration: CTR, Engagement, Lead-Volumen, CPL
Intent & Conversion: Lead-to-Sale-Conversion, CPA
Retention: Loyalty-Rate, CRM-Lifecycle-KPIs
Effizienz: Budget-Allokations-Effizienz
Forecasting: Genauigkeit der Demand-/Lead-/Sales-Forecasts




Skills & Kompetenzen

Ausgeprägte analytische Fähigkeiten und strategisches Denken
Expertise in Funnel-Performance, Digital Marketing und Media-Optimierung
Fähigkeit, Daten in umsetzbare Business-Insights zu übersetzen
Stakeholder-Management über Markt- und regionale Teams hinweg
Sicherer Umgang mit Analytics-Tools (GA4, Power BI/Tableau, CRM- & Media-Plattformen)
Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeit sowie Decision Enablement-Skills




Erfahrung

6–10+ Jahre in Performance Marketing, Digital Analytics oder Growth-Rollen
Nachweisliche Erfahrung im Management von Full-Funnel-KPIs
Erfahrung in der Arbeit innerhalb marktübergreifender bzw. regionaler Frameworks
Führungserfahrung mit Agenturen und cross-funktionalen Teams




Interesse geweckt? Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung!

Sie erwartet eine attraktive und herausfordernde Tätigkeit eines dynamischen und internationalen Automobilkonzerns. Wenn Sie sich durch unsere Stellenausschreibung angesprochen fühlen, dann freuen wir uns auf Ihre aussagekräftige Bewerbung (Motivationsschreiben, Lebenslauf, Zeugnisse) unter Angabe Ihres frühestmöglichen Eintrittstermins und Gehaltswunsches.




Bei Stellantis beurteilen wir Kandidaten auf der Grundlage ihrer Qualifikationen, Verdienste und unseren unternehmerischen Anforderungen. Wir freuen uns über Bewerbungen von Menschen aller Geschlechtsidentitäten, Altersgruppen, ethnischen Zugehörigkeiten, Nationalitäten, Religionen, sexuellen Orientierungen und Behinderungen. Vielfältige Teams machen es möglich, die sich verändernden Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden besser zu erfüllen und für unsere Zukunft zu sorgen.

description_full:
The Position

Join Boehringer Ingelheim’s Animal Health organization as a key expert driving the transformation of regional forecasting and demand planning processes. In this role, you will contribute to excellence in forecast performance, process efficiency, and system adoption while collaborating closely with cross‑functional partners to support strategic business needs.

Tasks & Responsibilities


In this role, you will lead regional demand forecasting by orchestrating, validating, and continuously improving statistically robust forecasts, integrating market intelligence, commercial insights, and local risks and opportunities in line with global standards
Within your area of responsibility, you will own the monthly demand forecasting cadence, ensuring strong governance, high data quality, and clear documentation of assumptions and rationale
By analyzing forecast performance, you will drive continuous improvement in forecast accuracy and bias through targeted corrective actions
As part of the regional organization, you will act as the forecasting business partner for commercial, finance, marketing, and supply chain stakeholders, ensuring transparent communication on assumptions, risks, scenarios, and opportunities
When supporting Regional and Global Demand Reviews, you will challenge inputs, highlight deviations, and escalate key risks where required
With a strong focus on data integrity, you will govern data quality, reporting, and insights, ensuring reliable master and transactional data within forecasting systems
By delivering executive‑level insights, you will ensure consistent KPI logic within the “Measure What Matters” framework and provide reporting via SAC and Power BI



Requirements


A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Analytics, Data Science, Statistics, or a related field
Several years of professional experience in forecasting, demand planning, or supply chain management, ideally within bio‑pharmaceutical, animal health, or FMCG environments
Advanced expertise in forecasting technologies such as SAP‑IBP, Kinaxis, or JDA, combined with strong knowledge of statistical modeling and predictive analytics
The ability to clearly communicate complex, data‑driven strategies to senior leaders and top management in global, cross‑cultural settings
Proven experience in leading and governing end‑to‑end S&OP or IBP processes at regional or global scale, translating analytical insights into business recommendations with impact on regional P&L
Fluency in English is required; German language skills and professional certifications such as APICS or IBF are considered an advantage



Applications from persons with severe disabilities are warmly welcomed. In cases of equal qualifications, such applicants will be given preferential consideration in the selection process.

Step 2: Virtual meeting in the period from beginning till mid of June

Step 3: On-site interviews mid/end of June

Please submit your application documents in English.

Our Company

With us, you can develop your own path in a company with a culture that knows our differences are our strengths - and break new ground in the drive to make millions of lives better.

Here, your development is our priority. Supporting you to build a career as part of a workplace that is independent, authentic and bold, while tackling challenging work in a respectful and friendly environment where everyone is valued and welcomed.

Alongside, you have access to programs and groups that ensure your health and wellbeing are looked after - as we make major investments to drive global accessibility to healthcare. By being part of a team that is constantly innovating, you'll be helping to transform lives for generations.
