Strategische Consumer-Insights-Ausrichtung: Entwicklung und Weiterentwicklung der internationalen Consumer-Insights-Strategie und Research-Roadmap in enger Zusammenarbeit mit dem Head of Division Product Marketing, mit Fokus auf CEWE Fotofinishing und den deutschen Markt

Bedarfsmanagement & Priorisierung: Identifikation, Challenge und Priorisierung von Forschungsbedarfen der Fachbereiche nach Business-Relevanz sowie strategische Steuerung der Marktforschung

Consumer Intelligence & Wissensmanagement: Aufbau und kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung eines Consumer-Intelligence-Hubs inkl. Standards, Guidelines, Prozessen und nachhaltiger Konsolidierung von Studienergebnissen

Insightsbasierte Innovation & Testing: Steuerung eines insightsbasierten Innovationsprozesses inklusive Konzeption, Durchführung und Entscheidungsvorbereitung von Konzept- und Produkttests

End-to-End-Research-Steuerung: Planung, Beauftragung und Steuerung qualitativer und quantitativer Studien (intern & extern) von der Hypothesenbildung bis zur Ergebnispräsentation inklusive Qualitäts- und Budgetverantwortung

Methodische Beratung & Qualitätssicherung: Beratung interner Stakeholder zu Studiendesigns und Methoden sowie Sicherstellung hoher Qualitätsstandards über alle Research-Projekte hinweg

Insight-Übersetzung & Stakeholder-Kommunikation: Analyse und Interpretation von Daten, Ableitung geschäftsrelevanter Handlungsempfehlungen, adressatengerechte Präsentationen bis auf Managementebene sowie Moderation von Workshops und Zusammenarbeit mit externen Partnern

Dein Profil

Akademische Qualifikation & Erfahrung: Abgeschlossenes Hochschulstudium (z. B. Wirtschafts‑/Sozialwissenschaften, Psychologie, Marketing) sowie relevante Berufserfahrung in Marktforschung/Consumer Insights, idealerweise im internationalen B2C-Umfeld

Methoden- & Datenkompetenz: Sehr gute Kenntnisse qualitativer und quantitativer Methoden (z. B. Tracker, Segmentierungen, Konzept‑/Produkttests, Pricing, UX) sowie sicherer Umgang mit Daten‑, Reporting‑ und Visualisierungstools

Internationale Studien & Partnersteuerung: Erfahrung in Planung, Steuerung und Auswertung internationaler Studien, Budgetverantwortung und Zusammenarbeit mit externen Marktforschungsinstituten

Strategische Insights-Ausrichtung: Erfahrung im Aufbau bzw. der Weiterentwicklung von Insights-Funktionen, Research-Roadmaps sowie in der Ausrichtung an Unternehmens‑ und Markenstrategien

Business Impact & Kommunikation: Fähigkeit, aus Studien klare Handlungsempfehlungen abzuleiten und Ergebnisse überzeugend bis auf Managementebene in Deutsch und Englisch zu präsentieren

Arbeitsweise & Beratungskompetenz: Strategisch-analytisches Denken, strukturierte und selbstständige Arbeitsweise, hohe Beratungs‑ und Durchsetzungskompetenz sowie sicheres Projekt‑ und Prioritätenmanagement

Persönlichkeit: Team‑ und Kollaborationsfähigkeit, internationale Offenheit, Freude am Aufbau von Strukturen

Deine Benefits

Flexibilität & Work-Life-Balance: Flexible Arbeitszeitmodelle, mobiles Arbeiten bis zu 60% (positionsabhängig) sowie 30 Urlaubstage

Finanzielle Benefits: Betriebliche Altersvorsorge, Mitarbeiteraktienprogramm, Mitarbeiterrabatte etc.

Umfangreiche Weiterentwicklungsmöglichkeiten: Vielseitige Angebote aus Seminaren, Trainings und individuellen Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, um beruflich und persönlich zu wachsen

Innovative & offene Unternehmenskultur mit jeder Menge Teamspirit: Wir bieten ein strukturiertes Onboarding sowie jährliche Highlights wie beispielsweise unser Sommerfest

Vielfalt & Verantwortung: Wir setzen auf Diversity, Inklusion und Nachhaltigkeit

Familienfreundlicher Arbeitgeber: Tagesbetreuung "cewelino" und Ferienbetreuungsprogramme direkt am Standort

Vielfältige Gesundheitsangebote: Hansefit, Fahrradleasing, psychosoziale Beratung, mobile Massagen und vieles mehr

Moderne Arbeitsumgebung: Neueste Ausstattung, höhenverstellbare Schreibtische und ein Betriebsrestaurant für die gemeinsame Mittagspause

CEWE steht seit 1961 für Innovation, Kreativität und hochwertige Fotoprodukte, die Menschen in ganz Europa begeistern. Mehr als 3.100 Mitarbeitende prägen ein Arbeitsumfeld, das von Teamgeist, Offenheit und Vielfalt getragen wird. Ob in Produktion, Technik oder unseren Zentralbereichen – gemeinsam entwickeln wir Produkte, die Erinnerungen bewahren, darunter das CEWE FOTOBUCH, Wandbilder, Kalender und viele weitere Fotogeschenke. Bei CEWE erwartet Dich ein inspirierendes und wertschätzendes Umfeld, in dem Du Deine Ideen einbringen und die Zukunft des Fotofinishings aktiv mitgestalten kannst.

description_full:
Responsibilities
The Measurement team is responsible for interpreting the performance of advertising on our platform. We work with advertisers to optimise their activity on the platform and build meaningful connections that help drive behaviour change.

About the Role
This Measurement Partner role partners with leading clients in the designated region, supporting a mix of branding-focused as well as app and web performance-driven advertisers, to help measure the effectiveness of their investment in our platform with performance-focussed advertisers. In addition, the Measurement Partner partners with key cross-functional teams such as sales, product marketing, measurement product, and business marketing to ensure that clients and agencies have best-in-class support.

Highly-driven and empathetic, the Measurement Partner will build on our Measurement discipline where execution, curiosity, and data-driven thinking in a fast-growth environment to make others better is critical for success.

Responsibilities:
- Partner primarily with clients and agencies to provide good measurement that can lead to better understanding of their performance on the platform
- Focus on strategic consulting together with revenue and product teams to help drive and implement learning agendas for clients across branding, app and web performance use cases
- Analyse data to develop advanced analytics projects tailor made for clients to prove that TikTok works
- Manage client and agency feedback to ensure their voice is reflected with our product and partnerships teams

Qualifications
Minimum Qualifications:
- Extensive, proven experience with digital advertising, large marketing-related organizations, or measurement suppliers
- Relevant bachelor's degree; or equivalent in a quantitative field.
- A track record of inferential problem solving through experimental design and analytical methods
- Exceptional time-management and goal-oriented task management skills are required
- Familiarity with experimentation, incrementality testing as well as attribution and Media Mix Modelling, including triangulation across these methodologies
- Familiarity with digital analytics tools such as Google Analytics, Adobe Analytics
- Exposure to e-commerce-heavy advertisers that are heavily engaging in app and/or web performance measurement is essential

Preferred Qualifications:
- Graduate degree within a science, mathematics, operations, business, digital marketing, or research field preferred
- Experience with advertising agencies or complex marketing data-driven organizations
- Familiarity with privacy-first innovation for measurement systems
- Experience with executing custom analytical work

About TikTok
TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.​


Why Join Us
Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.​
We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.​
​
Diversity & Inclusion​
TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.​

Zeitraum: ab Mitte August, 6 Monate für 20h/Woche (Werkstudent*in) oder 39 h/Woche (Praktikant*in)

Join our global team to help us achieve our social mission: to make millions of people’s opinions heard for the benefit of our local, national, and international communities.

If our research is to be truly representative of what the world thinks, we need people from all walks of life to be part of the team to bring their perspective to the work we do.

Life at YouGov

We are driven by a set of shared values. We are fast, fearless, and innovative. We work diligently to get it right. We are guided by accuracy, ethics, and proven methodologies. We respect and trust each other, bringing these values into everything that we do.

We strive to provide YouGovers with best-in-class benefits to support their physical, financial, and emotional wellbeing. We want our employees to have a sense of belonging and uniqueness in a supportive workplace, so they can bring their full selves to work.

Du übernimmst Projektleitung- und Projektmanagement und koordinierst die Zusammenarbeit vieler interner und externer Stakeholder mit dem Ziel, Marketinginvestitionen wirksam und transparent zu steuern.

description_full:
Join Hostinger, and we’ll grow fast! 🚀

We’re shaping the future of online success - powered by AI and driven by people. With 900+ talented professionals and over 5 million clients in 150 countries, we help creators and entrepreneurs bring their ideas to life faster and easier than ever before.

Our mission: To provide tools that help individuals and small businesses succeed online faster and easier.

Our culture: Guided by 10 company principles.

Our formula for success: Customer obsession, innovative products, and talented teams.

As a Marketing Analytics Lead, you won’t just support our marketing analytics strategy - you will create and implement it. You will build and empower a team of high-caliber analysts to transform complex datasets into competitive intelligence that fuels our global growth. By owning the standard for data-driven decision-making, you will raise the bar for speed, precision and impact across Hostinger's multi-channel operation - from Affiliates and Influencers to PPC and Organic.

Sounds like an exciting challenge? Let us meet and discuss how you can help scale Hostinger even further.

Your day-to-day


Set and uphold the standard for data-driven decision-making, ensuring our marketing strategies and decisions are backed by data.
Lead the execution of marketing analytics projects, translating raw data into growth opportunities.
Build a team better than yourself - hire, onboard, mentor and inspire a squad of high-performing analysts, fostering a culture where technical mastery intersects curiosity and drive.
Collaborate directly with marketing leaders (Affiliates, Influencers, PPC, SEO, Product Marketing Managers and other) to align analytical roadmaps with our goals.
Take full ownership of delivery lifecycle - from refining complex requirements to prioritizing the backlog, constantly ensuring we're always working on the highest impact bets.
Keep on iterating in terms of team setup and ways of work - integrate AI or other emerging technologies, test decentralised leadership concepts or go full agile - freedom to reinvent the playbook.


Your Skills And Experience


Proven hiring, onboarding and leadership skills with a track record of building environments where people perform at their peak.
A relentless drive for achieving ambitious goals through data analysis, together with uncompromising standards for quality and speed of delivery.
Solid understanding of marketing fundamentals, data signatures of different channels and marketing attribution concepts (or a strong willingness and interest to learn).
Extensive hands-on data analytics experience, with proficiency in SQL & data visualization tools (we use Tableau).
Strong business acumen with a proven track record of translating complex data into impactful business decisions.
Stakeholder management experience - ability to collaborate effectively across different seniority levels and bridge the gap between technical and non-technical colleagues.
An innovative, results-oriented attitude that constantly seeks to improve processes, team setup and outcomes.


Benefits For You


🚀 360 Growth: We provide limitless learning opportunities: access to platforms like Reforge and Scribd, global conferences, physical and digital libraries, feedback culture, and mentoring through TesoXchange. Advance your career with internal mobility and grow with a team eager to share knowledge and support your success.
🎯 Freedom & responsibility: Work on your terms: from modern offices in Kaunas, Vilnius, or Indonesia, the comfort of home, or anywhere in the world. Enjoy flexibility in managing your schedule and bring your ideas to life in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.
💪Wellness simplified: Your health comes first with insurance from Day 1, gym memberships, recharge leave, and regular health checks. Join sports, arts, and hobby clubs or simply enjoy the balance of a lifestyle that prioritizes wellness.
🎉 Work hard - play hard: Celebrate your achievements with company events like Summerfest & Winterfest, Town Hall, Meet the Client initiatives, team-buildings, and workations. Enjoy access to the Žalgiris Arena VIP Lounge and celebrate life’s big moments with milestone gifts for weddings, new parenthood, and graduations.


Compensation


Gross salary starting from 6000 EUR/month, depending on your experience and skills.


We’re always looking for experienced talent to raise the bar. If you’re excited about the role but the listed salary range doesn’t align with your expectations, we still encourage you to apply - we’re open to adjusting compensation based on the impact and value you bring.

Get ready to take your personal and professional growth to new heights! Join Hostinger today and be part of our journey 🚀

Three. Two. Onboard

description_full:
We are one of Europe’s leading providers in the field of live commerce, offering the most entertaining way to shop as a media platform. With our curated product portfolio spanning fashion, jewelry, beauty, wellness, household, and home & living, we inspire countless viewers, fans, and followers every day across all channels – on TV, in our online shop, and on social media. By seamlessly connecting lifestyle themes and brand worlds, we are driving innovation in cross-channel shopping entertainment. Our customers decide when and where they want to shop with HSE.




What you can expect:

You design, develop and optimize modern BI and analytics solutions to enable data-driven decision making
You analyze requirements from business departments and translate them into KPIs, semantic models, reports and interactive dashboards
You develop automated self-service BI solutions and ensure a consistent definition and use of relevant KPIs
You build and maintain data models using DBT and Snowflake applying dimensional modeling techniques
You work according to modern development standards such as clean code, test-driven development and automated testing to ensure high data quality
You manage code using Git, apply structured branch strategies and support CI/CD processes for reliable deployments
You analyze data sources together with the Data Platform team and derive optimizations for BI solutions and reporting structures
You collaborate closely with Product Owners, Data Platform and business teams and contribute to the continuous development of BI architecture and technologies







Your profile:

You have a relevant degree or a comparable qualification and several years of experience in BI, analytics or a similar environment
You have strong experience with BI tools such as Power BI, Tableau or Google Looker Studio including administration, governance and architectural design
You have deep knowledge of SQL, solid Python skills and practical experience with DBT and Snowflake modeling
You are experienced in data modeling, reporting technologies and analyzing data using basic statistical methods
You have strong analytical skills and a structured working style with the ability to support data-driven decision making
You are confident working with KPIs, BI technologies and modern analytics environments - You communicate clearly, work well in teams and take ownership with a solution-oriented mindset
You are fluent in English, German is a plus
You are willing to work on site at our campus 2 days per week




We look forward to receiving your application!
